name: Integration tests assert toBeDefined() on UUID fields (no format check)
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-10] toBeDefined() passes for '' / 0 / null; a partial-failure null id would pass. Fix: toMatch UUID regex for createdIds.
acceptanceCriteria:
Root cause: the family-bridge integration test checks createdIds with toBeDefined only, so empty strings, nulls, or non-UUID values could slip through without proving the clone returned usable IDs.
Variants:
- createdIds.topicId is present and UUID-shaped.
- createdIds.subjectId is present and UUID-shaped.
- createdIds.bookId is present and UUID-shaped.
Regression: strengthen tests/integration/family-bridge.integration.test.ts so the clone-created IDs match a UUID regex and the test fails for empty, null, or malformed IDs while still passing for a valid cloned curriculum chain.
